---
title: "Resume"
format: html
---

# Resume

[Download My Resume](static/Cameron_Hayman_Resume.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

---

## 🎓 Education

- **M.S. Data Science**, Willamette University (Expected 2025)  
- **B.A. Mathematics (Applied Computer Science)**, Wells College  
- **B.A. Accounting (Auditing)**, Washington & Jefferson College  
  - 150+ credit hours  
  - Minors: Computing & Information Studies, Professional Writing

---

## 🧠 Technical Skills

- **Languages**: Python, R, SQL, PowerShell, VBA  
- **Quant Research**: Mean Reversion, Factor Modeling, Financial Modeling (Excel), Cointegration, GARCH, ARIMA, Monte Carlo    
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Grafana, Prometheus, alpaca-trade-api, Airflow, ClickHouse, AWS  
- **ML Models**: Regression Models, Neural Networks (MLPs, LSTMs), KNN, SVM, Naive Bayes
- **Visualization**: ggplot2, matplotlib, Shiny, Tableau, Power BI

##  Relevant Python Libraries:
- **Quant Libraries**: pandas, numpy, scipy, statsmodels, QuantLib, bt, backtrader, zipline, alphalens, quantstats, pyfolio  
- **ML / Forecasting**: scikit-learn, xgboost, keras, prophet, neuralprophet, statsmodels, h2o  
- **NLP & Alt Data**: transformers, finbert, nltk, spacy, vaderSentiment, beautifulsoup4  
---

## 💼 Experience

**CFA Research Challenge**  
- Co-authored equity research valuation report for Absci  
- DCF, DuPont, and asset turnover modeling in R

**Tech & Accounting Intern – HPM Tech Services**  
- Built custom BI tools and automated reporting pipelines

---

## ⚾ Athletics & Recognition

- NCAA D3 Baseball: Highest active winning percentage (.918) during tenure (2020-2023); Ranked top-3 nationally in saves as high leverage reliever (2024)
- 1st Place: Elevator Pitch Competition  
- 2nd Place: Business Design Challenge
